mentions.note: Reports Wednesday; microcosm of higher-end travel market; consumer holding strong; fresh start for new CEO Josh Silverman; press the bet.
Disney Cruises okay within Disney confines but Disney stock itself very tough to own; collateral to cruise play but broader Disney weakness limits recommendation.
Stuck in cable TV purgatory; should acquire Norwegian Cruise to boost vacation/cruise business and escape linear TV decline; new CEO Josh Dearco ran cruise business.
CEO succession announcement expected this week could break logjam keeping stock in tight range; used to own for charitable trust but left due to lack of traction.
